28853.title: Sam Fender: MTV Live From Fusion..
28853.description: ... Festival 2019. Coverage from this year's Fusion Festival, where Sam Fender took to the stage to perform his hits including 'Play God', 'Spice' and 'Hypersonic Missiles'.
